findings.check: ATLAS heartbeat parse (health, GI, anomalies, EVE tension)
findings.detail: Reviewed 20260330T075247Z.json: health=nominal; endpoints micro_agents, integrity, runtime all true; signals composite=0.729, anomalies=2, gi=0.83, mode=green. EVE global_tension is not present in this heartbeat payload; cross-check used live /api/eve/global-news at verification time.

Live fetch ~2026-03-30T10:03:09Z: anomalies[] still exactly two elevated items — GAIA/USGS (43 quakes M2.5+ today, max M7.3 near Susitna North, Alaska) and DAEDALUS-µ Self-ping HTTP 401 in 71ms. Composite 0.718 vs heartbeat 0.729 (~1.5% lower): stable, not a recovery signal. HERMES-µ reports Wikipedia API fetch failed (agent error) but not listed in anomalies[]; THEMIS healthy=true in this snapshot.

Both anomaly types persist (not transient). Seismic remains elevated; magnitude context (M7.3) is strong natural-hazard signal versus typical noise. Self-ping stays elevated with HTTP 401 — same class as prior ZEUS runs; likely stable auth/health-endpoint behavior rather than new regression.

source=mock — global_integrity=0.83 and mode=green are not production-verified against a live ledger. terminal_status=nominal aligns with heartbeat gi/mode snapshot. signals.freshness=0.6 and information=0.6 explain partial GI drag versus 1.0 dimensions; kv=false. Timestamp ~2026-03-30T10:03:08Z is fresh for this run.

findings.check: Vercel deployment health (READY, ERROR in 6h, ignoreCommand)
findings.detail: No Vercel CLI or VERCEL_TOKEN in this environment — could not list deployments or confirm READY vs ERROR in the last six hours, or observe ignoreCommand skipping bot builds. Unauthenticated probe to api.vercel.com/v6/deployments returned 403 as expected. Production HTTPS for /api/signals/micro, /api/integrity-status, and /api/eve/global-news returned 200 with JSON bodies at verification time.

findings.check: EVE /api/eve/global-news vs GI and micro anomalies
findings.detail: global_tension=low; source=mock, degraded=true, degradedReason=EVE live feed returned no fresh items — placeholders only. No conflict with mode=green on integrity-status for this run (unlike high-tension vs green GI scenarios). Persistent micro anomalies (seismic, self-ping) do not correlate with EVE headline themes; consistent with infrastructure/geophysical drivers, not geopolitical narrative.

eve_correlation: EVE is on mock fallback with global_tension low; items are placeholders about feed offline/reconnecting. No meaningful correlation between EVE text and USGS or Self-ping anomalies — those signals stand apart as earth-observation and app self-check behavior.
recommendation: ATLAS nominal snapshot matches live micro topology and counts. Do not treat GI as operationally verified until integrity-status source is live; investigate EVE live feed path when degradedReason persists. Obtain Vercel API credentials for a future ZEUS run to validate deployment READY/ERROR and ignoreCommand. If Self-ping 401 is intentional, document or tune anomaly rules to reduce standing noise.
